description_long: This object is a decorative potted plant featuring a cluster of vibrant pink flowers with yellow centers, surrounded by broad, glossy green leaves. The flowers are arranged in a dense bouquet, with some buds and petals extending above the main cluster, giving a lush and full appearance. The plant is housed in a round, dark-colored ceramic pot with a smooth, shiny finish. On one side of the pot, there is a visible label or tag, suggesting it may be a commercially sold or identified plant. The overall design is ornamental, making it suitable for display in both indoor and outdoor urban environments. The pot appears sturdy and stable, capable of supporting the weight of the plant and soil within.
description: A lush potted plant with vibrant pink flowers and broad green leaves in a glossy dark ceramic pot, featuring a visible label on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing a dense cluster of pink flowers and green leaves in a shiny dark pot, with the floral arrangement most prominent.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered arrangement of flowers and leaves, with the pot's curvature visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pot's label and some decorative ties, with the flowers and leaves partially obscuring the pot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the lush foliage and flowers, with the pot's glossy surface reflecting light.
attribute_plant_species: impatiens (Impatiens walleriana) or similar ornamental flowering plant
attribute_pot_decoration: plain with glossy finish and a visible label/tag
